Operation.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName='Cassowary' or defName='Chinchilla' or defName='Deer' or defName='Elk' or defName='Warg')]/modExtensions/li[@Class='VEF.AnimalBehaviours.ExtendedRaceProperties']

nomatch.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName='Cassowary' or defName='Chinchilla' or defName='Deer' or defName='Elk' or defName='Warg')]

Operation.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName='Cat' or defName='Lynx' or defName='Cougar' or defName='Panther' or defName='Megasloth' or defName='WildBoar' or defName='Rat' or defName='Boomrat' or defName='Alphabeaver' or defName='Raccoon')]/modExtensions/li[@Class='VEF.AnimalBehaviours.ExtendedRaceProperties']

nomatch.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName='Cat' or defName='Lynx' or defName='Cougar' or defName='Panther' or defName='Megasloth' or defName='WildBoar' or defName='Rat' or defName='Boomrat' or defName='Alphabeaver' or defName='Raccoon')]
